targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gmv),0)::double precision AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_daily_business_kpis WHERE metric_date = CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_revenue),0)::double precision AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_daily_business_kpis WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day';

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(orders_count)=0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(gmv)/SUM(orders_count))::double precision END AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_daily_business_kpis WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day';
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(retention_rate),0)::double precision AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_cohort_retention WHERE canonical_day_marker = 30 AND activity_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 day';

SELECT metric_date::timestamp AS time, SUM(gmv)::double precision AS gmv, SUM(net_revenue)::double precision AS net_revenue FROM dwh_marts.mart_daily_business_kpis WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT metric_date::timestamp AS time, SUM(new_buyers_count)::double precision AS new_buyers, SUM(repeat_buyers_count)::double precision AS repeat_buyers FROM dwh_marts.mart_daily_business_kpis WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT category, SUM(gross_revenue)::double precision AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_category_performance WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT metric_date::timestamp AS time, channel, SUM(planned_budget)::double precision AS value FROM dwh_marts.mart_marketing_channel WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 day' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT cohort_month, customers_count, avg_ltv_30d, avg_ltv_90d, avg_ltv_180d, avg_ltv_365d, avg_cac, ltv_cac_ratio, payback_months, limitations_note FROM dwh_marts.mart_unit_economics ORDER BY cohort_month DESC LIMIT 24;
